figures.caption: Figure 1: System-level overview of the proposed HFD-TM framework. Block A encodes corridorlevel through flows from historical inputs, Block B expands corridor predictions into turning movements using contextual information, and Block C refines predictions with residual correction and zero-movement masking.
Table 2: Ablation Study Results. ∆MAE is reported relative to the full HFD-TM model.

Figure 2: Comparison of mean absolute error (MAE) across baseline models and the proposed HFD-TM framework.
